import cvxpy as cp
import numpy as np
import math


class Solver:
    def solve(self, problem, **kwargs) -> dict:
        P = np.array(problem["P"])
        m, n = P.shape
        if not (P.shape[0] == m and P.shape[1] == n):
            raise ValueError("P must have shape ({}, {})".format(n, m))
        if not (n > 0 and m > 0):
            raise ValueError("n and m must be positive.")
        if not np.allclose(np.sum(P, axis=0), 1):
            print("Warning: Columns of P do not sum to 1.")

        x = cp.Variable(shape=n, name="x")
        y = P @ x
        c = np.sum(np.log2(np.maximum(P, 1e-12)) * P, axis=0)
        mutual_information = c @ x + cp.sum(-y * cp.log2(y + 1e-12))
        objective = cp.Maximize(mutual_information)
        constraints = [cp.sum(x) == 1, x >= 0]

        prob = cp.Problem(objective, constraints)
        prob.solve(solver=cp.ECOS, abstol=1e-9, reltol=1e-9)

        if prob.status not in [cp.OPTIMAL, cp.OPTIMAL_INACCURATE]:
            print(f"Solver status: {prob.status}")
        if prob.value is None:
            print(f"Solver finished but solution is None. Status: {prob.status}")
            return None

        return {"x": x.value.tolist(), "C": prob.value}
